raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a complaint regarding Citibanks handling of a disputed {$2500.00} charge from XXXX XXXX XXXX  / XXXX dated XX/XX/year>. 
Case # : XXXX I did not authorize this transaction, do not recognize the merchant, and did not receive any goods or services from this merchant. 

When I first filed a complaint they cancelled my credit card and promised to look into it. 
Then I received a letter saying case closed. 

I called again and complained. They apologized and was told by a supervisor that the case had not been well handled. They re-opened the case and said they would get back to me in a a few days. This was XX/XX/XXXX. I heard nothing. 
I emailed the fraud department and heard nothing as well. 
I called today and reached a supervisor who told me the case is now officially closed. 
All they can tell me was that my phone authorized the charge. 
I told them, I have no idea who this merchant is, there is no agreement with them. So I asked Citi for proof from the merchant. IP address. Etc. And they provided none. And will not send me any evidence of their case. 

I followed proper procedures by reporting the charge, reopening the dispute, and submitting a written statement. Citibank has denied my claim without providing sufficient evidence of authorization.

I am requesting : 1. A full copy of all evidence used to deny my claim 2. A proper investigation under the Fair Credit Billing Act 3. Reversal of this unauthorized charge This matter involves a significant amount and appears to involve fraudulent or misrepresented billing. 
The {$2500.00} is a lot for me and it is causing undo hardship on myself and my family. 

I request immediate review and resolution. 
Thanks for your help! 
XXXX
